news.title:
Nestle's Q3 FY26 results exceeded Dolat Capital's estimates with 18.3% YoY domestic sales growth and 22.9% YoY export growth.
Dolat Capital raised FY26-28 EPS estimates slightly, set a target price of Rs 1,363, and reaffirmed its 'Reduce' rating due to limited upside.
news.summary:
Nestle's Q3 FY26 results exceeded Dolat Capital's estimates with 18.3% YoY domestic sales growth and 22.9% YoY export growth.
Dolat Capital raised FY26-28 EPS estimates slightly, set a target price of Rs 1,363, and reaffirmed its 'Reduce' rating due to limited upside.

news.title:
